stemHtml: Why is an engine vibration monitoring system installed on jet engines?

options.a: It monitors for changes in an engine`s vibration level, to indicate a possible engine failure.
options.b: To register engine vibrations during flight in turbulent conditions.
options.c: To dampen changes in an engine`s vibration level, in order to meter the fuel flow.
options.d: It monitors the vibration at the engine pylon, to indicate an impending engine separation.
